entities.name: N5
entities.context: an entity or tool involved in filtering meetings

entities.name: Deep Work blocks
entities.context: a type of work event to be excluded from the digest

entities.name: Meeting Buffers
entities.context: a type of event to be excluded from the digest

entities.name: Follow-up slots
entities.context: a type of event to be excluded unless action items are added

entities.name: Travel buffers
entities.context: auto-generated event type to be excluded from the digest

entities.name: Postponed meetings
entities.context: type of meetings to be excluded based on status tag

entities.name: Inactive threads
entities.context: type of threads to be excluded based on status tag

relationships.context: N5 filters out Deep Work blocks from meeting schedules
N5 filters out Meeting Buffers from meeting schedules
N5 excludes Follow-up slots unless action items are present
N5 filters out Travel buffers from meeting schedules
N5 filters out Postponed meetings based on status tag
N5 filters out Inactive threads based on status tag
